title: Support Deenabandhu Trust
subtitle: Every contribution helps us transform lives through education, healthcare, rural development, and social welfare. Your generosity creates hope for thousands of families.

india.description: For donations within India, you can contribute through Net Banking, NEFT, RTGS, IMPS, Cheque, or Direct Bank Transfer using the details below.

upi.title: Contributions can also be made by scanning this UPI QR Code.

usa.title: International Donations
usa.description: Supporters outside India can contribute through our trusted international partner. Every international donation directly supports our education, healthcare, food assistance, and rural development initiatives.

items.title: Education
items.description: Providing quality education and learning resources for underprivileged children.

items.title: Food Support
items.description: Supplying nutritious meals to families and children in need.

items.title: Healthcare
items.description: Organizing free medical camps, medicines, and health awareness programs.

items.title: Rural Development
items.description: Empowering villages through sustainable development projects.

faq.question: How can I donate?
faq.answer: You can donate through Bank Transfer, NEFT, RTGS, IMPS, Cheque, or by scanning our UPI QR Code.

faq.question: Can I donate from outside India?
faq.answer: Yes. International donors can contribute through our overseas partner organization.

faq.question: Will I receive a donation receipt?
faq.answer: Yes. Once your donation is received, an official receipt will be issued.

faq.question: Where is my donation used?
faq.answer: Your contribution supports education, healthcare, food distribution, rural development, and community welfare programs.

faq.question: Is my donation secure?
faq.answer: Yes. All donations are processed through secure banking channels and trusted payment methods.
